name: OWASP LLM Top 10 Auditor
description: Static detection of OWASP LLM Top 10 (2025) risks in AI-application source: prompt injection, insecure output handling, untrusted model/data loading, system-prompt secret leakage, unbounded consumption, and over-autonomous agents.
author: NisargHunter AI core

permissions.reason: Reads application source files to analyze; does not execute them.
